title: Social isolation and loneliness: Association with perceived age discrimination in a prospective analysis of ELSA.
author: Aminu, Abodunrin Quadri
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is a presentation at the 2021 Health User Conference organised by the UK data service. The project focused on the impact of age discrimination on social isolation and loneliness among older adults in the UK.
steps_raw: This is a presentation at the 2021 Health User Conference organised by the UK data service. The project focused on the impact of age discrimination on social isolation and loneliness among older adults in the UK.
keywords: Loneliness, Ageing, Older adults, Age discrimination, Social Isolation
